title: JAMB UTME 2027 Registration Opens
description: JAMB begins accepting registrations for the 2027 Unified Tertiary Matriculation Examination. Visit jamb.gov.ng to register. Registration usually runs for 3 months.

title: WAEC SSCE 2026 Results Release
description: WAEC 2026 Senior School Certificate Examination results are expected to be released. Check results at waecdirect.org using your examination number and scratch card PIN.

title: NECO SSCE 2026 Examination Begins
description: The National Examinations Council Senior School Certificate Examination for 2026 begins. Candidates should check timetables from their schools and NECO's official portal.

title: Post-UTME Screening Season Begins
description: Universities across Nigeria begin their Post-UTME screening exercises. Check your institution's portal for your specific date, venue and requirements. Prepare using the BQM Post-UTME Calculator.

title: MTN Foundation Scholarship Deadline
description: Deadline for submitting the MTN Foundation Scholarship application. Ensure all documents are uploaded and your application is complete before this date.
